title: More Clear Glass
description: It makes glass and colored glass clearer
body:
## This resource pack removes 5 pixels from glass texture to make it more clear
### Before the resource pack :
![Before clear](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0dc89cd31b9517a9bfa4b0a45120c86c4b12597b_0.webp)
### After the resource pack :
![After clear](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b0e4a5ae7187b87e237ca1802c294c20a69fc8e7_0.webp)
I only made this because I was bored and wanted to do something. There are better ones, so check those out instead of getting this one if you want.
